name: estate-management-root
description: Root workspace to launch Estate Management backend, frontend, and admin dashboard

scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix admin
scripts.dev: concurrently -n "backend,frontend,admin" -c "blue,green,magenta" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run dev --prefix admin"
